description: Legal document(s). In Arabic script. The same block of text seems to be copied at least three times, followed by witness statements. At the far lower left, after a basmala, there appears the name Muḥammad b. Ṭalḥa. Dated: Dhū l-Qaʿda 485 AH, which is 1092/93 CE. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
